title: Why your health insurance won't cover the true cost of ageing

title: Sebi discontinues investor risk reduction access platform for stock brokers
summary: Market regulator Sebi on Thursday discontinued the Investor Risk Reduction Access (IRRA) platform for stock brokers with immediate effect, citing its redundancy amid stronger business continuity and cyber resilience frameworks in the securities market.

title: BSE Q4 Results: Cons PAT jumps 61% YoY to Rs 797 crore, revenue soars 85%; Rs 10/share dividend announced
